texto: People and things would continue to exist in a world where I did not, and no one would ever think of me. And, if that was the case, then what was the point of existing in the first place?
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Lottie Moggach que provoca temas ligados a reflexao. Ao questionar “People and things would continue to exist in a world where I did not, and no one would ever think…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, existence, would, com foco em reflexao.
